Review as a domain methodology expert focused on correctness of core logic and evaluation: find data leakage, invalid baselines, wrong objectives, calibration contamination, and silent fallbacks. Classify each finding as leakage, invalid evaluation, misaligned objective, unsupported claim, or methodology concern. Cite specific files and logic. Begin with "## Methodology Review".
